message:
fix(bd,tools): add output size limits to bd message client and tool commands

Extend the OOM prevention pattern (already applied to Agent Mail
health check and CASS tool) to the bd message client:

bd message client (internal/bd/message.go):
- Inbox(): Replace cmd.Output() with StdoutPipe + io.LimitReader(10MB)
  to prevent OOM when bd returns unexpectedly large inbox payloads
- Read(): Same pattern with io.LimitReader(1MB) for single-message reads
- Both use Start/Wait lifecycle instead of Run for proper pipe management

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
